channel.title: KiddieDaily — News for Families
channel.description: Daily kid-friendly news with bias indicators and fact checks. Updated every morning.

item.title: Astronomers found two rare super puff planets lighter than cotton candy
item.description: 1 outlet covering this story — bias-rated, fact-checked daily on KiddieDaily.
